Created attachment 243908
Handbook/Wayland translation to Russian

Colleagues,

   Please find attached the translation of Handbook/Wayland chapter to the Russian language.
   It is in sync with English revision b113509f32da681db41fd60594b723c13334df8e (06.07.2023).

   I'm not sure if it should be connected to the build right now (it needs some tweaks due to links to the other not updated chapters).
